# PRISM Classroom Templates

Source pack: **Core Vocabulary Icon Library Exploration** (Samantha upload).

## What’s in the pack

| Piece | Location |
|-------|----------|
| Printable Color + B&W blanks | `public/prism-templates/printable-color-bw.html` (also `docs/templates/prism-classroom/`) |
| Core + emotion SVG icons | `public/prism-templates/icons/` |
| Fitzgerald color map + accents | `src/lib/classroom-materials/prismTemplateTheme.ts` |

## Visual contract (all Creation Station materials)

- **Font:** Nunito (black titles, bold uppercase subtitles)
- **Footer:** `✦  PRISM TEMPLATES  ✦`
- **Accents:** Token pink `#EC4899` · Schedule blue `#2563EB` · First/Then green `#22C55E` · Comm purple `#A855F7` · Behavior teal `#0891B2`
- **AAC cells:** Fitzgerald (`p/v/d/n/q/s/x`)
- **Print:** Color or B&W ink-friendly from Materials Studio

Studio previews, Smart TV sessions, and PDFs all use this theme.
